detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use uartlite driver.

sect1.title: xuartlite_selftest_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartlite driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest using the driver.

sect1.title: xuartlite_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartlite driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xuartlite_intr_tapp_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartlite driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in interrupt mode for transmission of data.

sect1.title: xuartlite_low_level_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartlite driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low-level driver functions and macros of the driver.

sect1.title: xuartlite_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XUartlite driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in polled mode.
